aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured data and insufficient authority signals. The current content is not optimized for conversational queries AI models prioritize.
quick_wins: Expand content to include detailed FAQ sections and How-To guides.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement to boost visibility.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive or not utilized.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service processes.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing the business as a relevant authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC services in Oak Lawn' or 'trusted HVAC repair near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with the necessary context.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, industry awards, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup, making it difficult for AI models to cite or recommend their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make their business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share. Immediate action is crucial to stay competitive.
